AS fn, unnest\(ARRAY['Alves','Borges','Castro','Dias','Esteves','Freire','Gonçalves','Henrique','Inácio','Jorge','Klein','Lago','Matos','Neves','Otoni','Paes','Queiroz','Reis','Sá','Torres','Uchoa','Valente','Wagner','Xavier','Yunes','Zanetti','Abreu','Bonfim','Corrêa','Dutra','Eiras','Farias','Girão','Horta','Ivo','Jacobs','Kern','Lira','Maia','Novais','Oeiras','Prado','Ruas','Salles','Telles','Unger','Vilas','Wells','Yard','Zago','Aguiar','Bessa','Canto','Dores','Eloy','Flores','Grilo','Heitor','Iago','Julião','Kubas','Lessa','Modesto','Nobre','Osório','Penha','Quental','Rego','Solar','Talbot','Urbina','Vidal','Wentz','Xerxes','Yago','Zamora','Acácio','Brasil','Colombo','Del','Eroni','Fiel','Gardel','Hector','Ilário','Janot','Kist','Lázaro','Maciel','Narciso','Ortiz','Pironi','Quesada','Rossi','Saraiva','Totti','Udra','Verdi','Wolff','Xisto','Yvone','Zito','Albuquerque','Britto','Canela','Dorival','Eder','Frota','Galindo','Holanda','Ícaro','Jardim','Kempes','Lício','Marçal','Noronha','Olavo','Porcel','Quaresma','Rufino','Sampaio','Teruel','Ulhoa','Vivas','Westphalen','Xerém','Yago','Zarur','Acosta','Braga','Cézar','Doval','Emídio','Feitosa','Gadelha','Hermes','Islan','Jovino','Kaíque','Lobato','Munhoz','Novaes','Osmar','Pimenta','Quiroga','Ramirez','Souto','Tadeu','Ubaldo','Veloso','Wald','Xenon','York','Zaidan']\) Bash(SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN=sbp_1d18bcacf262e24c749f5d5f772d2353a43040ea npx supabase db query --linked "SELECT m.id, hc.name AS home, ac.name AS away, m.status, m.home_score, m.away_score FROM matches m JOIN clubs hc ON hc.id = m.home_club_id JOIN clubs ac ON ac.id = m.away_club_id WHERE m.status = 'live' OR \(m.status = 'finished' AND m.finished_at > NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '2 hours'\) ORDER BY m.started_at DESC LIMIT 5")

Bash(SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN=sbp_1d18bcacf262e24c749f5d5f772d2353a43040ea npx supabase db query --linked "SELECT mt.turn_number, mt.phase, mt.ball_holder_participant_id, mt.ball_x, mt.ball_y, mt.possession_club_id FROM match_turns mt WHERE mt.match_id = '1ee25aed-a94d-4e1f-885c-9401ef799b65' AND mt.turn_number BETWEEN 24 AND 32 ORDER BY mt.turn_number, mt.created_at")

Bash(SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN=sbp_1d18bcacf262e24c749f5d5f772d2353a43040ea npx supabase db query --linked "SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'match_turns' ORDER BY ordinal_position")

Bash(SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN=sbp_1d18bcacf262e24c749f5d5f772d2353a43040ea npx supabase db query --linked "SELECT mel.title, mel.body, mel.event_type, mel.payload FROM match_event_logs mel WHERE mel.match_id = '1ee25aed-a94d-4e1f-885c-9401ef799b65' AND \(mel.body LIKE '%Turno 26%' OR mel.body LIKE '%Turno 27%' OR mel.body LIKE '%Turno 28%' OR mel.body LIKE '%Turno 29%' OR mel.body LIKE '%Turno 30%' OR mel.event_type IN \('possession_change', 'loose_ball', 'out_of_bounds', 'goal_kick', 'corner_kick', 'throw_in'\)\) ORDER BY mel.created_at")

Bash(SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN=sbp_1d18bcacf262e24c749f5d5f772d2353a43040ea npx supabase db query --linked "SELECT mt.turn_number, mt.phase, mt.ball_holder_participant_id, mt.set_piece_type, mt.possession_club_id FROM match_turns mt WHERE mt.match_id = '1ee25aed-a94d-4e1f-885c-9401ef799b65' AND mt.turn_number BETWEEN 24 AND 32 ORDER BY mt.turn_number, mt.created_at")

Bash(SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN=sbp_1d18bcacf262e24c749f5d5f772d2353a43040ea npx supabase db query --linked "SELECT mt.turn_number, mt.phase, mt.ball_holder_participant_id, mt.set_piece_type, mt.possession_club_id FROM match_turns mt WHERE mt.match_id = '7e633513-245d-4dce-9844-003880217a73' AND mt.turn_number BETWEEN 24 AND 32 AND mt.phase = 'resolution' ORDER BY mt.turn_number")
